title: Lumo Fundamentals: Meet Mallam
description: Bundled offline-first fundamentals pack for the first Mallam-led learner exchange.

module.title: Meet Mallam
module.description: A calm, offline-first starter module that teaches the learner how Mallam greets, asks, and waits for a response.
module.voicePrompt: Meet Mallam. Listen, repeat, point, and answer one step at a time.
module.readinessGoal: Ready to greet Mallam, follow a simple prompt, and finish the first guided exchange.
